name: SAP Litmos LMS API
what_it_does: SAP Litmos REST API for cloud-based learning management system. Enables AI agents to manage users and teams, enroll learners in courses, track learning completions and quiz scores, retrieve certifications, and integrate training data into HR and compliance workflows. Litmos is known for rapid deployment and a large pre-built course library.
use_cases: Enrolling employees in training courses from HR onboarding agents
Tracking compliance training completions from regulatory compliance agents
Retrieving learner progress and certification data from L&D reporting agents
Integrating Litmos training records into HRIS and performance management agents
not_for: Academic education (Litmos is corporate training focused)
Self-paced individual learning without enterprise account
best_when: An organization using SAP Litmos wants AI agents to automate course enrollment, track compliance training, and integrate learning records into HR and compliance workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee learning records and assessment data are personal data. Handle per employment law and GDPR requirements.

auth.notes: Litmos API uses API key authentication passed as a query parameter (apiKey). Account-level API key available in Litmos admin settings. No OAuth support.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; SAP enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Premier, and Platinum plans; pricing per active user
pricing.notes: SAP Litmos is enterprise LMS. Part of SAP portfolio. Contact SAP for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: 150 API calls per minute per API key

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee learning records and test scores are personal HR data
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
API key passed as query parameter — avoid logging URLs that contain API keys
Rate limit of 150 req/min — implement back-off for bulk enrollment operations
No webhook support — must poll for completion status changes
SAP ownership means slower innovation and enterprise-heavy sales process
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee learning records and assessment data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key as query parameter is less secure — avoid logging. No OAuth scope control.

security_score_components.security_notes: Learning records and assessment data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key in query params — log sanitization required.
